seoTitle: How to Create and Sell a Course on Gumroad
metaDescription: Learn how to build an online course on Gumroad, from choosing the course product type to uploading lessons and publishing for students.
intro: Gumroad supports course creators through a dedicated product type that makes it easy to organize lessons and sell access to your training. This guide covers setting up your course listing, uploading lecture content, and publishing so students can start enrolling.

steps.heading: Choose the course product type
steps.body: Select the course or tutorial option when creating a new product so Gumroad structures the listing for lessons.

steps.heading: Write your curriculum description
steps.body: Clearly outline what students will learn and the outcomes they can expect from the course.

steps.heading: Design your cover and thumbnails
steps.body: Upload visuals that represent your course professionally on the storefront.

steps.heading: Upload your course content
steps.body: Add video lessons, PDF workbooks, or slide presentations that make up your curriculum.

steps.heading: Set pricing and publish
steps.body: Choose your price, then publish your course to generate a shareable link for students.

faq.question: What content types can I include in a Gumroad course?
faq.answer: Courses can include video lessons, PDF workbooks, and slide presentations, depending on what you upload.

faq.question: Can students access the course content forever?
faq.answer: Access terms depend on how you structure the product, though many course sellers offer lifetime access to buyers.

faq.question: Can I add new lessons after publishing my course?
faq.answer: Yes, you can continue uploading additional content modules after the course goes live.

faq.question: How do students find my course link?
faq.answer: Once published, you get a shareable link you can distribute through your own marketing channels.
